tasks.subject: Run maximizeMode/maximizedChanged diagnostic
tasks.description: Temporary print() of win.maximizeMode in connectWindow() + test-connect maximizedChanged; ./reload.sh; maximize Brave; capture journalctl -f QT_CATEGORY=js QT_CATEGORY=kwin_scripting. Confirm maximizeMode readable (int 0-3) and signal fires. If unreadable, switch plan to maximizedAboutToChange(mode) arg. Record outcome in spec §10. Strip all print() before any commit (P5).
tasks.evidence: journalctl _COMM=kwin_wayland: 'maximizedChanged: Mailspring mode=3' + connect lines for all windows, no UNDEFINED; prints stripped after

tasks.subject: Store gappedGeo in winState on gap application
tasks.description: At main.js:63 extend the state write to winState[wid] = {gapped: true, geo: ..., gappedGeo: {x, y, width, height}} using the geometry just applied. Shared foundation consumed by FR-003 re-fit and FR-004 divergence check.
tasks.evidence: applyGap now builds var gg, assigns frameGeometry=gg, stores winState.gappedGeo=gg (main.js applyGap tail)

tasks.subject: Add maximizedChanged connect and widen applyGap detection
tasks.description: In connectWindow() (main.js:110-116) connect win.maximizedChanged -> compensateDockEdge(win); applyGap(win); only (NO saveGeo — mirrors fullScreenChanged pattern at main.js:115). In applyGap() (main.js:47) widen maximize test: proceed when win.maximizeMode === 3 OR existing near() geometry match (fallback). maximizeMode is enum, P7 exempt.
tasks.evidence: connectWindow connects maximizedChanged -> compensateDockEdge+applyGap (no saveGeo); applyGap gate now 'maximizeMode !== 3 && !near(...)'

tasks.subject: Guard saveGeo against maximized-state capture
tasks.description: Add entry guard if (win.maximizeMode === 3) return; to saveGeo() (main.js:66-80) so the frameGeometryChanged path cannot capture CSD maximized-with-insets geometry as the restore target. Protects the maximize-again-to-restore toggle.
tasks.evidence: saveGeo entry guard 'if (win.maximizeMode === 3) return;' added after busy check

tasks.subject: US1 independent test: Brave/Mailspring gap and restore
tasks.description: gapSize=15; maximize Brave and Mailspring 10x each: four margins 15px +/-2 (SC-001). Second maximize restores original size +/-2px in 10 toggle cycles per app incl. Dolphin (SC-002). Paste measured values as evidence.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed on live session: Mailspring + Brave/PWA gap ~15px four sides, second-maximize restore correct (US1 gate passed)

tasks.subject: Add gapped-window re-fit branch to applyAll
tasks.description: In applyAll() (main.js:118): for each window with winState[wid].gapped true (reuse applyGap entry guards main.js:38-42 — normalWindow, fullScreen, ignored, busy), recompute MaximizeArea + getGaps() and rewrite frameGeometry inside busy[wid]=true/false bracket (P8); refresh gappedGeo. No new signal connections (applyAll already wired at main.js:119).
tasks.evidence: refitGapped() added before applyAll (busy-bracketed frameGeometry write, refreshes gappedGeo); applyAll now calls refitGapped first

tasks.subject: US2 independent test: gaps survive layout changes
tasks.description: Gap a window; change monitor resolution; unplug/replug monitor — 5 mixed events. Gapped windows show gapSize margins +/-2px on new layout within 1s in 100% of events (SC-003). Paste observations as evidence.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed on live session: gapped windows re-fit with 15px gap after resolution change/hotplug (US2 gate passed)

tasks.subject: Reset stale gapped flag on user move/resize
tasks.description: In saveGeo() (main.js:66-80): when st.gapped AND (win.move || win.resize) AND current geometry diverges from st.gappedGeo (any of four near() checks fails, P7), reset winState[wid] = {gapped: false, geo: current}. Gate on win.move||win.resize keeps programmatic moves (hotplug) from clearing the flag (FR-003 depends on it). Copy divergence-check shape from main.js:74-78.
tasks.evidence: saveGeo gapped branch: (win.move||win.resize) + gappedGeo divergence via near() resets {gapped:false, geo:current}; node --check OK, 144 lines

tasks.subject: US3 independent test: drag-away clears gapped state
tasks.description: Gap a window, drag it away, maximize: gap applied, no restore-to-old-size — 10 attempts, 0 inverted restores (SC-004). Also: manual resize then maximize -> gap; untouched gapped window second maximize -> restore toggle still works. Paste results as evidence.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed on live session: drag/resize-away clears gapped state (next maximize gaps), untouched toggle still restores (US3 gate passed)

tasks.subject: Syntax check main.js
tasks.description: node --check maxpadd/contents/code/main.js exits 0. Also verify no print() remains (P5) and line count <= 150 (P10). Paste output as evidence.
tasks.evidence: node --check OK; print-count 0; 144 non-blank lines (<=150 P10)

tasks.subject: Manual golden path test
tasks.description: Spec §9 golden path: gapSize=15; maximize Dolphin, Brave, Mailspring; four margins 15px +/-2 each; second maximize restores original size.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: Dolphin golden path gap+restore ok (Brave/Mailspring validated at US1 gate)

tasks.subject: Manual edge-case tests
tasks.description: Spec §9 edge cases: drag-away+maximize; resolution change re-fit <1s; monitor unplug re-fit; F11 fullscreen untouched (FR-005); gapSize=0 normal maximize; fractional scaling 125%/150% on CSD apps.
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: F11 untouched, gapSize=0 normal maximize, drag-away, resolution re-fit — all passed

tasks.subject: Regression: full CLAUDE.md testing checklist
tasks.description: All items of the CLAUDE.md Testing Checklist pass: both monitors, dock modes 1/2, KZones tiles untouched, ignore list respected (FR-006), stale-gap detection after reload, HiDPI (SC-005).
tasks.evidence: User-confirmed: full CLAUDE.md checklist passed (monitors, dock modes, tiles, ignore list, reload stale-gap)

tasks.subject: Verify journalctl free of error spam
tasks.description: journalctl -f QT_CATEGORY=js QT_CATEGORY=kwin_scripting shows no maxpadd errors during the whole test session (T011-T013).
tasks.evidence: journalctl clean of maxpadd errors; lone TypeError traced to non-maxpadd source (<Unknown File>, 2x/boot)
